top_signals.title: OPEC+ Ratifies Planned Oil Quota Hike as Gulf Flows Rebound
top_signals.summary: Major OPEC+ members agreed another modest increase to their collective oil-production quotas for next month, adding to the prospect of more supply eventually hitting the market if a US-Iran peace pact can stick.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
